title: Peristrophe jalappifolia
taxonomy: Peristrophe jalappifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to India, where it is commonly found in the wild. The classification of Peristrophe jalappifolia is further divided into its kingdom, which is Plantae, and its order, Lamiales. Its family, Acanthaceae, is a large and diverse family of flowering plants, commonly known as the acanthus family. Peristrophe jalappifolia is a member of the genus Peristrophe, which consists of various species of flowering plants found in tropical regions.
